diff:
--- a/billing/invoices.py
+++ b/billing/invoices.py
@@ -22,6 +22,9 @@
 def generate_invoice(order_id: str) -> dict:
     order = Order.get(order_id)
+    if not order:
+        raise ValueError(f'Order {order_id} not found')
     items = order.items
-    total = sum(i.price for i in items)
+    total = sum(i.price * (1 - i.discount_pct / 100) for i in items)
     return create_pdf(order, items, total)
